customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high self-direction. Jody is a 22-year homeowner who has already self-installed solar on his workshop and has been thinking about a whole-home conversion. He is not a skeptic — he is a buyer evaluating options. His primary concern is practical: he wants to install on the garage (metal roof) rather than the house because he knows the house roof will eventually need replacement and wants to keep it clean. No financial anxiety surfaced; credit confirmed well above threshold.
unresolved_concerns: Wife is on the title and was not included in the appointment booking — closer must confirm she will be present or reschedule to include her.
Jody has done DIY pricing research and may arrive with self-formed cost expectations — closer should probe what he found before presenting numbers.
Jody's stated preference is garage installation, not house installation — the design and proposal must reflect this or the closer will lose credibility immediately.
Jody mentioned a future house roof replacement — the roofing cross-sell was not raised by the setter and remains available for the closer to surface.
sensitive_topics_raised: Planned house roof replacement — Jody explicitly does not want to touch the house roof right now; do not push house-roof solar unless Jody opens the door.
Existing DIY solar system on workshop — Jody has hands-on solar experience; do not over-explain basics or treat him as a first-time learner.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment blocked for one hour so Jody does not feel rushed.
Confirmation text to be sent after the call.
closer_should_know: The wife is on the title and was not included in the booking — confirm she is present before starting the proposal, or the appointment is structurally at risk. Jody's install target is the garage (metal roof), not the house; the design must reflect that. He has existing DIY solar experience and has self-researched pricing, so he will notice if the proposal does not match his specific setup or if the closer treats him as a solar novice.
